name: deepgram-js-text-to-speech
description: Use when writing or reviewing JavaScript/TypeScript in this repo that calls Deepgram Text-to-Speech v1 (`/v1/speak`) for audio synthesis.

我需要處理 deepgram js text to speech 相關工作

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.
